title: astragalus qohestanicus
intro: Astragalus qohestanicus, also known as a type of Astragalus plant, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Iran. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus qohestanicus include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and enhancing cardiovascular health. Astragalus qohestanicus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and prevent illness.
